inputs.name: ariaDescribedby
inputs.description: ARIA value for `aria-describedby` attribute.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: ARIA value for `aria-label` attribute.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledby
inputs.description: ARIA value for `aria-labelledby` attribute

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the button.

inputs.name: flat
inputs.description: @deprecated Use `ghost` option in `look` instead.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the button.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the button.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Sets the selected state of the button.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the button.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Sets the tabindex of the button.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Sets the toggleable state of the button.
If set to `true`, the button will toggle its selected state on click.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Sets the disabled state of the button group.
If true, all buttons in the group will be disabled.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the button group.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the rounded style of the button group.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the button group.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description: Sets the selection mode of the button group.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the chip.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Sets the label of the chip.If the label is set, the chip will display the label instead of the content.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the chip.

inputs.name: removable
inputs.description: Sets the removable state of the chip.If true, the chip will display a remove icon.

inputs.name: remove
inputs.description: Emits when the {@link removable} is set to true and the remove icon is clicked.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Sets the tabindex of the chip.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the button.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the button.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the button.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the button.

inputs.name: backgroundColor
inputs.description:
Sets the background color of the avatar.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: borderColor
inputs.description: Sets the border color of the avatar.

inputs.name: borderRadius
inputs.description:
Sets the border radius of the avatar.
Can be a percentage or pixel value.

inputs.name: borderWidth
inputs.description:
Sets the border width of the avatar.
Can be a pixel value.

inputs.name: customStyles
inputs.description:
Custom styles to apply to the avatar.
This can be used to override default styles or add additional styles.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description:
Sets the height of the avatar.
Can be a pixel value or a string with units (e.g., "64px").

inputs.name: image
inputs.description:
Sets the image URL for the avatar.
If an image is provided, the avatar will display the image instead of a label.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description:
Sets the label for the avatar.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: labelColor
inputs.description:
Sets the color of the label text.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: labelFontSize
inputs.description:
Sets the font size of the label text.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: labelFontWeight
inputs.description:
Sets the font weight of the label text.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description:
Sets the width of the avatar.
Can be a pixel value or a string with units (e.g., "64px").

inputs.name: anchorConnectionPoint
inputs.description: The anchor connection point of the context menu.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the context menu is closed.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: The context object to be passed to the menu items.

inputs.name: menuItems
inputs.description: The menu items to be displayed in the context menu.If this is set, the menu items from the content children will be ignored.

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description: Minimum width of the context menu. Only applies to the root context menu.

inputs.name: navigate
inputs.description: Emits when context menu navigation occurs.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: The offset of the context menu.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the context menu is opened.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: The popup class of the context menu.

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description: The event that triggers the context menu.

inputs.name: userClasses
inputs.description: The user classes to be applied to the context menu.These will be applied to the root context menu and all submenus.

inputs.name: userStyles
inputs.description: The user styles to be applied to the context menu.These will be applied to the root context menu and all submenus.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: The width of the context menu. Only applies to the root context menu.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the menu item as disabled.

inputs.name: divider
inputs.description: Sets the menu item as a divider.A divider is a horizontal line that separates menu items.

inputs.name: iconClass
inputs.description: The icon class to use for the menu item.

inputs.name: menuClick
inputs.description: Emits when the menu item is clicked.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The text to display for the menu item.

inputs.name: click
inputs.description: Emits when the button is clicked.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the button is disabled.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Whether the button is selected.

inputs.name: blur
inputs.description: Emits when the editor loses focus.

inputs.name: create
inputs.description: Emits when the editor is created for the first time and is ready to be used.

inputs.name: focus
inputs.description: Emits when the editor gains focus.

inputs.name: selectionUpdate
inputs.description: Emits when the selection of the editor changes.

inputs.name: update
inputs.description: Emits when the content of the editor changes.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: The initial content of the editor.Accepted values are:- A string representing the HTML content.- A {@link JSONContent} representing the content.

inputs.name: settings
inputs.description: The settings of the editor.

inputs.name: cellEdit
inputs.description: Emitted when a cell is edited.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The row data to be displayed in the grid.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description: Initial filter configuration to be applied to the grid when it is loaded.

inputs.name: filterable
inputs.description: Whether the grid is filterable.

inputs.name: pageSize
inputs.description: The number of items to be displayed on a page.

inputs.name: pageSizeValues
inputs.description: The page sizes that the user can select from.These values will be displayed in the page size dropdown.

inputs.name: reorderable
inputs.description: Whether the columns of the grid can be reordered.

inputs.name: resizable
inputs.description: Whether the columns of the grid can be resized.

inputs.name: resizeMethod
inputs.description: The method to be used to set initial column widths.It can be the following values:- `fitView`: The columns will be resized to fit the available width.- `auto`: The columns will be resized based on the content.- A number representing the width of the columns. All columns except the columns with a specified width  will have the same width.@default "fitView"

inputs.name: responsivePager
inputs.description: Whether the pager is responsive.If set to `true`, the pager will be displayed as a dropdown when the grid width gets smaller.

inputs.name: sort
inputs.description: Initial sort configuration to be applied to the grid when it is loaded.

inputs.name: sortable
inputs.description: Whether the grid is sortable.

inputs.name: nodeClick
inputs.description: The node click event emitter.

inputs.name: animate
inputs.description: Whether to animate the tree.If true, the tree will animate when expanding or collapsing nodes.

inputs.name: children
inputs.description: The children selector for the tree.It can be either of the following:- A string representing the property name of the children.- A function that returns the children of a node.- A function that returns an observable that emits the children of a node.@param value The children selector for the tree.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The data for the tree.

inputs.name: hasChildren
inputs.description: The predicate to determine if a node has children.Required if the children selector is set to a function that returns an observable.@param value The predicate to determine if a node has children.

inputs.name: idField
inputs.description: The field that represents the unique identifier of a node.This is required if the data structure is set to `flat`.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: The data structure of the tree.It can be either of the following:- `flat`: The tree is a flat list of nodes.- `hierarchical`: The tree is a hierarchical structure.If the data structure is set to `flat`, the following fields are required:- {@link idField}- {@link parentIdField}If the data structure is set to `hierarchical`, the following fields are required:- {@link children}- {@link hasChildren}

inputs.name: parentIdField
inputs.description: The field that represents the parent identifier of a node.This is required if the data structure is set to `flat`.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description: The text field for the tree.It can be either of the following:- A string representing the property name of the text.- A function that returns the text of a node.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the button.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the button.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the button.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the button.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Sets the tabindex of the button.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Sets the text of the button.

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Specifies the format of the color output.

inputs.name: opacity
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the alpha slider.@default true

inputs.name: showButtons
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the buttons.When set to true, the color picker will display the "Apply" and "Cancel" buttons.When set to false, the color picker will not display the buttons and will emit the color value on change.@default true

inputs.name: showHexInput
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the hex input.@default true

inputs.name: showRgbInput
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the RGB input.@default true

inputs.name: closeOnSelect
inputs.description: Whether to close the color picker when a color is selected.Only applies when {@link view} is set to "palette".@default true

inputs.name: columns
inputs.description: The number of columns to display in the color palette.Only applies when the view is set to "palette" and the palette is a custom array of colors.@default 10

inputs.name: opacity
inputs.description: Whether to display the opacity slider.Only applies when the view is set to "gradient".@default true

inputs.name: decimals
inputs.description:
Number of decimals to show.
@default 0

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is disabled.

inputs.name: formatter
inputs.description: Formats the value to be displayed in the input when the input is not focused.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element is blurred.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element is focused.

inputs.name: inputFocusOut
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element loses focus.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Maximum value that can be entered.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Minimum value that can be entered.

inputs.name: nullable
inputs.description: Sets whether the input can be empty.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is readonly.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is required.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the input.

inputs.name: spinners
inputs.description: Sets whether the spin buttons are visible.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Step value to increment or decrement the value.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Tab index of the input.

inputs.name: color
inputs.description: Color of progress bar. Can be string or function that takes progress value and returns color.

inputs.name: progress
inputs.description: Progress value in percentage. Value must be between 0 and 100.Do not use together with the {@link value} input.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Progress value in absolute value. Value must be between min and max.Do not use together with the {@link progress} input.
